subcodes.first_line: The world hath borne witness that He is verily the Most Great Name and that He is the Hidden Mystery wherefrom they were deprived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد العالم بانه لهو الاسم الاعظم و انه لهو الغیب المکنون ان الذی کان محروما
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @presence of; reunion with God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
